标题: MM6 Thickened Straight-leg Casual Pants strike a perfect balance between avant-garde fashion and everyday wearability. Crafted from delicate textured fabric, these pants exude a casual and laid-back vibe. The pure and sophisticated off-white color easily pairs with various tops. The loose and flowing silhouette of the pants is highly inclusive to different body shapes, creating a relaxed and casual atmosphere when worn. The deconstructive design details by MM6 are evident in the drawstring waist that retains the casual essence, the interplay of light and dark seams on the pants, and the discreet brand label on the back pocket that embodies a subtle sense of luxury. Whether paired with a simple T-shirt for a street-style look or clashed with an oversized blazer for a high-fashion statement, these pants can be the perfect finishing touch to any outfit. Sizes range from M to 3XL.

MM6 Winter Wide Leg Fleece Pants in deep space gray exude a relaxed high-end vibe. These fleece pants are crafted with three-dimensional seaming techniques to create a natural fluffy feel, forming a uniform "air insulation layer" on the surface. The wide leg cut drapes naturally from the hips to the ankles, loose yet not bulky, giving off a lazy elegance when walking, instantly elevating the relaxed atmosphere of autumn and winter. The elastic waistband with double drawstring design accommodates various waist sizes and allows for easy adjustment. The side slant pockets are just deep enough for a relaxed hand placement, while the hidden back pockets maintain practicality and a sleek overall silhouette. The finely brushed fleece lining ensures warmth without bulkiness, with neat and precise seaming and reinforced drawstring ends showcasing the brand's deconstructive design DNA. Available in sizes XS-L.

MM6 2025SS new gradient hot drilling jeans! Custom-made with water-washed denim made of pure cotton material, the fabric is soft to the touch and skin-friendly, providing a comfortable and breathable wearing experience, suitable for trendy outfits. The gradient hot drilling pattern decoration is meticulously crafted, requiring careful sewing before undergoing a light enzyme wash for a vintage color restoration effect. Each piece of fabric is strictly required to be cut in place, making it time-consuming and material-intensive. The casual and loose cut design, along with the hot drilling embellishment, makes it a must-have for those who value aesthetics and quality. Sizes: XS-L XS: Waist 80, Hip 64, Length 106 S: Waist 84, Hip 66, Length 107 M: Waist 88, Hip 68, Length 108 L: Waist 92, Hip 70, Length 109.

Maison Margiela splatter paint casual pants, custom-made with soft velvet and fine diagonal cotton jacquard. Outstanding texture, comfortable and skin-friendly. Featuring a khaki color palette inspired by earth tones, exuding a refined sense of calmness that comes with the passage of time. The splattered ink dots and colorful graffiti, like the unrestrained brushstrokes of an artist inspired, add a touch of artistic flair. The Maison Margiela logo is embroidered on the back, symbolizing the brand's belief with a restrained yet sophisticated aura. A quiet revolution in fashion is unfolding. Craftsmanship: Utilizing imported machine embroidery technology with advanced computer control systems and precision mechanical components to achieve high precision and smooth lines in the Maison Margiela digital embroidery work. Craftsmanship: Heavy washing and dirt spraying technique create a natural color blotch and stain effect on the fabric surface through physical and chemical means, simulating the worn traces after long-term wear. Craftsmanship: Each piece is meticulously hand-painted with splattered ink graffiti, showcasing exquisite painting skills and ensuring each piece is unique. After completion, the artwork is left to dry naturally. Accessories: Custom MM logo. Fit: Loose fit. Sizes: S, M, L, XL. 🔥

MM6 2025SS patchwork grid casual trousers, made of custom-woven and dyed grid fabric using high-count spun yarn. The three-dimensional grid pattern is formed by precise interweaving of dual-color warp and weft yarns, with strict control over yarn ratio and tension to ensure uniformity of the pattern.
